text:
Once upon a time there was a curious old owl.

One day she hooted into the forest instead of sleeping on her branch.

"A story?", she hooted.

She wandered the woods, hearing all manner of tales.

"A knight saves his princess!" There was laughter.

A princess who had never known love. She was inconsolable.

"A hero catches a giant fish!" That cheered her up.

Later she heard about a wise old owl.

"...An epic journey across mountains?"

"...Including a bath in a dragon's hoard?"

"Yes!" She flew off, planning.

Days turned into weeks.

During her adventure, she found treasures.

A gold cup!

She drank the wine but didn't taste it. The name?

"Ackneywine!"

That evening she sat on her branch.

She read the cup till dawn.

"'Best enjoyed when cold.'"

Her adventure was remarkable.

Now she loved storytelling. Maybe she’d write one herself!<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
